title: plectranthus malabaricus
intro: Plectranthus malabaricus, also known as Coleus amboinicus, is a plant species that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is commonly found in tropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, making it a popular choice for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Plectranthus malabaricus include reducing fever, relieving digestive problems, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for a range of applications in traditional and modern medicine.
